case_title: TALAL HAYDER VS. GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAYDER, TALAL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION DBA BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO THE JUDGMENT APPLIES ONLY TO THE ISSUES RAISED IN THIS CLAIM, AND SHALL NOT ACT TO MODIFY, VOID, OR EXTEND ANY WARRANTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAYDER, TALAL AS TO DEFENDANT GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION DBA BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-26-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION DBA BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF(S) AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,158.93 FILED BY HAYDER, TALAL AS TO DEFENDANT GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION DBA BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
